title: Billing: Usage & Billing (read-only tour)

nthRow.js: (()=>{const c=[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-chart-card')].find(c=>/Usage by Source/.test(c.textContent||''));return c?[...c.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')].find(tr=>/Nth Wash Rewards/.test(tr.textContent||'')):null})()

preflight.note: off-camera: stage the shared persisted sidebar panel expanded so step 1's active Billing > Usage & Billing link reads with a label. .wc-rail-panel-toggle is the same control both ways (probe-verified July 11: 'Hide panel' expanded at aside width 220 with the active 'Usage & Billing' link at x102 w203; 'Show panel' collapsed at aside width 1). Skipped when already expanded. This persisted preference drifts on the shared profile, so the pre-roll asserts abort a take that starts collapsed.

ops.note: pre-roll: start page staged on billing-usage.html (startUrl)
pre-roll: preflight left the Billing sidebar panel expanded so the active Usage & Billing link reads with a label; abort the take if collapsed
pre-roll: the Usage & Billing sidebar link is the active item
pre-roll load check: Overview active, 4 KPI tiles, 2 chart cards, 6 tabs, YTD present, Invoices badged 1 open, no agent-service error

read-only tour: the URL never changes across all 14 steps. The only clicks are the six pure client-side tab switches (verified in the page inline script: the .a-tab-btn handler only removes/adds the 'active' class on the button and its #tab-<key> panel — no fetch, XHR, localStorage, or form submit). Every money control (Export CSV, Export, Pay Now, Download PDF, Export All, PDF, Update Rate, Save Changes, Save Alerts, the pre-warning toggle) is pointed at / red-guardrailed, never pressed.

mutation guardrail: the Invoices tab keeps its '1 open' badge, the KPI band keeps $46.18 SMS / $33.88 Email, and the period stays 'May 2026' for the whole lesson — proves nothing was paid, exported, saved, or otherwise changed. Probe-verified July 11: the top band + invoice badge are byte-identical before and after walking all five detail tabs (INTEGRITY MATCH true).
